label: Personal / Life Admin
description: Manage real-life projects: home purchases, renovations, major decisions, travel, legal matters, or any complex personal undertaking. Claude tracks tasks, contacts, docs, and decisions so nothing falls through the cracks.
initial_prompt: Read CLAUDE.md and give me a status briefing: what's the project, what phase are we in, what are the open action items, and what's blocking us. Then ask what to work on.
